details.test: Task 1: Buy cheapest kitchen laminate under 2.50 for 150 sqft
Task 2: Search, compare two products, choose longest warranty, and save quote for 300 sqft
Task 3: Order 3 samples (carpet + 2 laminate) and proceed to sample checkout
Task 4: Schedule earliest weekday morning installation next month
Task 5: Room calculator for multiple rooms with 10% overage, add recommended qty to cart
Task 6: Order wood-look flooring with 20+ year warranty and select free shipping at checkout
Task 7: Add colored flooring to cart and apply GREEN10 promo code
Task 8: Book showroom visit at nearest store to 60601
Task 9: Request refinishing estimate for 180 sqft dining room with $800 budget
Task 10: Multi-room order (bedroom carpet + kitchen laminate) and guest checkout
